tools.name: call.postV01BulkCall
tools.description: Initiates multiple concurrent outbound calls

tools.name: call.postV01Call
tools.description: Initiates an outbound call

tools.name: call.postV01CancelScheduledHangup
tools.description: Cancels a scheduled hangup for a call

tools.name: call.postV01CancelScheduledPlay
tools.description: Cancels a scheduled playback request

tools.name: call.postV01GroupCall
tools.description: Initiate multiple racing outbound calls

tools.name: call.postV01HangupAllCalls
tools.description: Hangs up all established calls

tools.name: call.postV01HangupCall
tools.description: Hangs up a specific call

tools.name: call.postV01Play
tools.description: Plays media into a live call

tools.name: call.postV01PlayStop
tools.description: Interrupts media playback on a given call

tools.name: call.postV01RecordStart
tools.description: Initiates recording of a given call

tools.name: call.postV01RecordStop
tools.description: Stops the recording of a given call

tools.name: call.postV01ScheduleHangup
tools.description: Schedules a hangup for a specific call

tools.name: call.postV01SchedulePlay
tools.description: Schedules media playback for a specific call

tools.name: call.postV01SendDigits
tools.description: Emits DMTF tones to a call

tools.name: call.postV01SoundTouch
tools.description: Applies SoundTouch effects to a live call

tools.name: call.postV01SoundTouchStop
tools.description: Removes SoundTouch effects from a given call

tools.name: call.postV01TransferCall
tools.description: Replaces the RestXML flow of a live call

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceDeaf
tools.description: Blocks audio to one or more conference members

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceHangup
tools.description: Kicks one or more conference members, without playing the kick sound

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceKick
tools.description: Kicks one or more conference members

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceList
tools.description: Returns a list of all established conferences

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceListMembers
tools.description: Retrieves the member list for a given conference

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceMute
tools.description: Blocks audio from one or more conference members

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferencePlay
tools.description: Plays media to one or more conference members

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceRecordStart
tools.description: Initiates a conference recording

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceRecordStop
tools.description: Stops a conference recording

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceSpeak
tools.description: Plays synthesized speech into a conference

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceUndeaf
tools.description: Restores audio to one or more conference members

tools.name: conference.postV01ConferenceUnmute
tools.description: Restores audio from one or more conference members

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
